overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a medieval village at night. The player walks through a dirt courtyard between thatched-roof wooden buildings, eventually drawing a wooden club. Warm light glows from windows against the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square with thatched-roof buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village square toward a central longhouse, surveying the surroundings

entered.detail: large wooden building with steep thatched roof and lit windows
simple wooden post fence running alongside the path
tall wooden signpost with directional markers in the village center
smaller thatched-roof building on the right side of the square
low stone wall foundation visible on the right approach

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dark village square surrounded by traditional thatched-roof wooden buildings. The camera approaches a central longhouse with warm light glowing from its windows, passing a wooden fence on the left and approaching a tall signpost in the center.

events.description: player character equips a wooden club, visible in the right hand

agents.ego_description: walking while turning left to pass the longhouse, holding a wooden club ready

entered.detail: wooden cart or wagon wheel visible in the background near the fence

segments.scene_description: The player equips a wooden club and continues walking while turning left to pass the longhouse on the left side. A wooden cart wheel becomes visible in the background as the camera moves past the building, leaving the central signpost behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark medieval village square that transitions from an open courtyard toward the side of a glowing longhouse. It begins by advancing through the square surrounded by thatched-roof wooden buildings, passing a wooden fence on the left while approaching a central signpost. As the camera nears a longhouse with warm light emanating from its windows, the player equips a wooden club. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left to pass the length of the building, leaving the signpost behind. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a wooden cart wheel in the background as the movement continues past the structure.
